events.title: Q1 2026 Board Meeting

events.title: Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting
events.location: ACME Corp Headquarters — Executive Boardroom, 25th Floor, 200 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10166
events.description:
Official notice for the Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting.

Date & time: Sunday, March 15, 2026 — 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM (meeting email lists time zone as EST). Agenda (tentative): 10:00 AM Call to Order; 10:15 AM CEO Report; 11:00 AM CFO Financial Review; 12:00 PM Working Lunch; 1:00 PM Strategic Initiatives; 2:30 PM Committee Reports; 3:30 PM New Business; 4:00 PM Adjournment.

Video conference option: Zoom Meeting ID: 987 654 3210; Passcode: Board2026.

Board materials will be distributed one week prior to the meeting. Please confirm your attendance by March 1st (RSVP deadline).
